commented_code:
steps:
       - run: sudo apt-get update && sudo apt-get install -y libhdf5-dev
       - uses: actions/checkout@v6
-      - uses: astral-sh/setup-uv@v7
+      - uses: astral-sh/setup-uv@37802adc94f370d6bfd71619e3f0bf239e1f3b78 # v7

discussion_comments.commented_code:
@@ -11,7 +11,7 @@ jobs:
     steps:
       - run: sudo apt-get update && sudo apt-get install -y libhdf5-dev
       - uses: actions/checkout@v6
-      - uses: astral-sh/setup-uv@v7
+      - uses: astral-sh/setup-uv@37802adc94f370d6bfd71619e3f0bf239e1f3b78 # v7
discussion_comments.comment_body:
The comment is `# v7`, whereas the [current version is `v7.6.0`](https://github.com/astral-sh/setup-uv/releases), so if you are going to pin to the latest version, then comment ___needs___ to match.

`v7` allows GitHub Actions to run the latest-and-greatest 7.x.y version trusting Astral's Semantic Versioning.  If we are going to pin to a particular version, then Dependabot will generate a ton more pull requests.
* https://github.com/TheAlgorithms/Python/blob/master/.github/dependabot.yml

runs-on: ubuntu-latest
     steps:
       - uses: actions/checkout@v6
-      - uses: devcontainers/ci@v0.3
+      - uses: devcontainers/ci@8bf61b26e9c3a98f69cb6ce2f88d24ff59b785c6 # v0.3

discussion_comments.commented_code:
@@ -13,7 +13,7 @@ jobs:
     runs-on: ubuntu-latest
     steps:
       - uses: actions/checkout@v6
-      - uses: devcontainers/ci@v0.3
+      - uses: devcontainers/ci@8bf61b26e9c3a98f69cb6ce2f88d24ff59b785c6 # v0.3
discussion_comments.comment_body:
The comment is `# v0.3`, whereas the [current version is `v0.3.1900000417`](https://github.com/devcontainers/ci/releases), so if you are going to pin to the latest version, then comment ___needs___ to match.

`v0.3` allows GitHub Actions to run the latest-and-greatest 0.3.y version trusting devcontainers' Semantic Versioning.  If we are going to pin to a particular version, then Dependabot will generate a ton more pull requests.
* https://github.com/TheAlgorithms/Python/blob/master/.github/dependabot.yml

discussion_comments.comment_body:
[CONTRIBUTING.md says we always use the latest production version of CPython](https://github.com/TheAlgorithms/Python/blob/master/CONTRIBUTING.md#coding-style), so why slow down and invalidate our testing by using an old version of Python?
* https://blog.jetbrains.com/pycharm/2025/08/the-state-of-python-2025/#action-2-use-the-latest-python
